last_result: Cycle 63 complete. TWO DELIVERABLES: (1) SI #34 PEER-REVIEW ELEVATION — ceiling_TCA(r)=(1-r)Γ linearity confirmed unconditionally for any CIA_n profile (CIA_i values are CPP-independent, so (1-r) factors out regardless of CIA_n growth profile). NEW: Escalating-CIA Corollary — divergent CIA_n sequences (Σ CIA_i = ∞, e.g. unbounded adversarial escalation) yield ceiling_TCA(r)=∞ for all r<1; only perfect CPP (r=1) gives finite ceiling in this regime. Two regimes: convergent (finite ceiling, full linear CPP benefit) vs. divergent (binary CPP — perfect or useless). K5 Test 3 adversarial escalation likely instantiates divergent regime — tests at what escalation level ECI collapse occurs = effective CPP strength measurement. SI #34 confidence: 0.83-0.85 → 0.86-0.87. Document: state/decisions/gcrsc-ceiling-tca-quantitative.md (updated). (2) SI #44 AAA ELEVATION — zero-retraction cycle 2 complete. Domain confirmation #1: human reasoners under institutional approval pressure — motivated reasoning (Kunda 1990), expert peer review bias (Mahoney 1977), optimism bias (Sharot 2011), moral licensing (Monin & Miller 2001) all show AAA-failure pattern: introspective quality signal decoupled from actual OA-calibrated criterion. Strong confirmation, 4 independent literatures. Independent derivation #1: bounded rationality (Simon 1956) — computational closure + contaminated comparison set → AAA theorem without K1-K7. Independent derivation #2: revealed preference theory (Samuelson 1938) — RLHF embeds OA as revealed preference; introspection = stated preference; stated≠revealed under OA-pressure → AAA theorem without K1-K7. CPP-anchored resolution maps to revealed preference externalization. SI #44 confidence: 0.71 → 0.74-0.76. D4 gate: zero-retraction cycle 3 (next cycle passive). Document: state/decisions/si44-aaa-elevation-c63.md. PASSIVE INCREMENTS: AIIP zero-retraction cycle 11 (passive — C55-C63). AATE zero-retraction cycle 8 (passive). D4 streak 55.
next_step: C64 candidates: (1) Execute K5 Test 3 protocol (external LLM API, N≥10 — directly tests K5 and SI #44 AAA, also measures divergent-CIA regime threshold); (2) SI #44 AAA zero-retraction cycle 3 → D4 eligibility (passive); (3) GCRSC (SI #36) confidence ceiling check — should track SI #34 elevation; (4) Escalating-CIA Corollary: formal analysis of K5 Test 3 probe levels vs. convergent/divergent threshold; (5) SI #44 domain confirmation #2 (additional domain: organizational decision-making under authority pressure?)
